title: Global Supply Shortages Deepen as War Drags On, Risking Jobs and Growth
summary_full: After three months, the fallout of the closure of the Strait of Hormuz is spreading, with developing countries bearing the brunt of the shortfall.
summary_public: After three months, the fallout of the closure of the Strait of Hormuz is spreading, with developing countries bearing the brunt of the shortfall.
